data_description.password: The password of your myLeviton account.
data_description.username: The email address of your myLeviton account.

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.description: Importing the YAML configuration for {integration_title} failed because the myLeviton service could not be reached. Please check your network connectivity and then remove the `decora_wifi` YAML configuration from your `configuration.yaml` file and set up the integration again using the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.title: The {integration_title} YAML configuration import failed

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_aut.description: Importing the YAML configuration for {integration_title} failed because the provided credentials are invalid. Please remove the `decora_wifi` YAML configuration from your `configuration.yaml` file and set up the integration again using the UI with correct credentials.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_aut.title: The {integration_title} YAML configuration import failed
